hero.title: Luviji
hero.subtitle: Family winery & restaurant in the heart of Hvar

story.sectionSubtitle: Five generations of love for wine
story.text: Did you know that Hvar island witnesses 2,400 years of winemaking history? It all started with the arrival of ancient Greeks and it is still happening. The Luviji family has been making wine for 5 generations. We produce 6 brands of quality wines in our old family house in the town center. Become part of the Hvar wine story -- where history meets tradition!

wines.sectionSubtitle: 6 brands of quality wines -- indigenous Hvar grape varieties

tasting.sectionSubtitle: Experience our flavors in an authentic wine cellar
tasting.description: We offer tasting packages in our unique wine cellar in the old family house. Each package includes a homemade platter with cheeses, cured meats, homemade olive oil and bread.

restaurant.sectionSubtitle: Rooftop restaurant with views over Hvar town
restaurant.text: Besides our winery, we have a rooftop restaurant in the center of Hvar town where we serve traditional Dalmatian dishes paired with our own wines. Fresh grilled fish, octopus under the bell, gregada, homemade pasta -- all prepared with the freshest local ingredients and love for tradition.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: #7 of 19 Food & Drink in Hvar -- rated 4.9/5 on TripAdvisor

cta.title: Experience Authentic Hvar
cta.subtitle: Visit our tasting room in the old family house or reserve a table at our rooftop restaurant.

about.sectionSubtitle: Five generations of Hvar winemaking tradition
about.story:
Hvar island witnesses 2,400 years of winemaking history -- it all started with the arrival of ancient Greeks and it is still happening. The Luviji family has been making wine on this unique island for five generations. Our vineyards on the sun-drenched slopes of Hvar produce grapes of exceptional quality, and every bottle of our wine carries a story of patience, dedication and respect for nature.

Our tasting room is located in the old family house in the very center of Hvar town. We also have a rooftop restaurant where we offer guests authentic Dalmatian dishes paired with our wines. We produce 6 brands of quality wines -- from fresh whites to powerful reds, including our award-winning Plavac Mali which won the Gold medal and Best of Show Croatia title at BIWC 2024.
about.mission: Become part of the Hvar wine story -- where history meets tradition!
